goal: Produce a comprehensive markdown report at phlex-design/phlex-art-comparison-report.md analyzing Art vs Phlex persistent reference designs, migration considerations, and steps.

steps.description: List all markdown design documents in phlex-design/ to understand current Phlex design context.
steps.output: List of file paths matching phlex-design/*.md

steps.description: Read each design markdown file identified in step-1 to extract discussion of persistent references and backend-agnostic data description.
Search the Art codebase for definitions and usages of Art persistent reference types (art::Ptr, art::Assns, art::FindOne, art::FindMany, etc.).
steps.output: List of file paths and line numbers where these symbols appear

steps.description: Read a representative subset of Art algorithm source files from the grep results (e.g., up to 10 files) to see concrete usage patterns of persistent references in LArSoft algorithms.
steps.output: File contents showing Art persistent reference usage

steps.description: Locate Phlex migration example source files that attempt to translate Art algorithms to Phlex.
steps.output: List of migration example files under phlex-examples/migration/

steps.description: Read each migration example file from step-5 to capture how persistent references are currently expressed in Phlex code (if at all).
Synthesize a detailed markdown report comparing Art and Phlex persistent reference designs, addressing the four questions, and enumerating migration categories and remaining steps.
steps.self_check: Ensure the markdown contains sections: 1. Influence of framework differences on Phlex-native persistent references, 2. Re‑written algorithm example, 3. Categories of change preserving Art functionality, 4. Remaining migration steps.

steps.description: If the target report file already exists, read it first to satisfy edit pre‑condition; otherwise proceed to create the new report file.
steps.output: Existing file content or error indicating file does not exist

steps.description: Write the synthesized markdown report to phlex-design/phlex-art-comparison-report.md (overwrites any existing content).
steps.self_check: Verify file ends with a single newline and contains no trailing whitespace.
